early_childhood.name: Early Childhood (3-6 years)
early_childhood.description: Very simple, large shapes, chunky outlines for developing motor skills
early_childhood.context_prefix: [ADD YOUR CONTEXT HERE - will be prepended to child's speech]
early_childhood.example: If child says 'a cat', prompt becomes: '[YOUR CONTEXT] a cat'

middle_childhood.description: Moderate complexity with action and story elements
middle_childhood.context_prefix: [ADD YOUR CONTEXT HERE - will be prepended to child's speech]
middle_childhood.example: If child says 'a dragon', prompt becomes: '[YOUR CONTEXT] a dragon'

late_childhood.name: Late Childhood (10-12 years)
late_childhood.description: Detailed and intricate with creative concepts
late_childhood.context_prefix: [ADD YOUR CONTEXT HERE - will be prepended to child's speech]
late_childhood.example: If child says 'a wizard', prompt becomes: '[YOUR CONTEXT] a wizard'

teen.name: Teen (12+ years)
teen.description: Complex and sophisticated with realistic details
teen.context_prefix: [ADD YOUR CONTEXT HERE - will be prepended to child's speech]
teen.example: If child says 'a warrior', prompt becomes: '[YOUR CONTEXT] a warrior'

_notes: - This context is PREPENDED to whatever the child says
- Leave as [ADD YOUR CONTEXT HERE] to disable (uses only child's speech)
- Keep context short - 1-3 words that add flavor/style
- The system automatically adds technical style modifiers (line weight, etc)
